recommendations.title: Never Look Away
recommendations.overview: German artist Kurt Barnert has escaped East Germany and now lives in West Germany, but is tormented by his childhood under the Nazis and the GDR regime.

recommendations.title: White Oleander
recommendations.overview: A teenager journeys through a series of foster homes after her mother goes to prison for committing a crime of passion.

recommendations.title: Synonyms
recommendations.overview: A young Israeli man absconds to Paris to flee his nationality, aided by his trusty Franco-Israeli dictionary.

recommendations.title: The Saragossa Manuscript
recommendations.overview: During the Napoleonic wars, a Spanish officer and an opposing officer find a book written by the former's grandfather.

recommendations.title: Operation Finale
recommendations.overview: In 1960, a team of Israeli secret agents is deployed to find Adolf Eichmann, the infamous Nazi architect of the Holocaust, supposedly hidden in Argentina, and get him to Israel to be judged.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Bath
recommendations.overview: In 1750 Austria, a deeply religious woman named Agnes has just married her beloved, but her mind and heart soon grow heavy as her life becomes a long list of chores and expectations. Day after day, she is increasingly trapped in a murky and lonely pa

recommendations.title: Jai Bhim
recommendations.overview: A pregnant woman from a primitive tribal community, searches desperately for her husband, who is missing from police custody. So as to find her husband and seek justice for them, as their voice, a High Court advocate rises in support. Will their batt

recommendations.title: No Other Land
recommendations.overview: This film made by a Palestinian-Israeli collective shows the destruction of the occupied West Bank's Masafer Yatta by Israeli soldiers and the alliance which develops between the Palestinian activist Basel and Israeli journalist Yuval.
recommendations.director: Hamdan Ballal, Basel Adra, Rachel Szor, Yuval Abraham

recommendations.title: Number 24
recommendations.overview: On the brink of the Second World War, a young Norwegian man's drive to resist the Nazis sets a new course for his future – and the future of his country.

recommendations.title: Broken Flowers
recommendations.overview: Introverted Don Johnston receives an anonymous letter from an ex-lover informing him that he has a son who may be looking for him. A freelance sleuth neighbor motivates Don to embark on a cross-country search for his past flames seeking answers.
